agent_base_generate_contract.events: base contract only; concrete agent responses observed via orchestrator_step

batch_run_simulation_alias.events: batch module alias for Layer 1 simulation execution/evaluation envelope
batch_run_simulation_alias.signature: (orchestrator: Union[tau2.orchestrator.orchestrator.Orchestrator, tau2.orchestrator.full_duplex_orchestrator.FullDuplexOrchestrator], *, evaluation_type: tau2.evaluator.evaluator.EvaluationType = <EvaluationType.ALL: 'all'>, env_kwargs: Optional[dict] = None) -> tau2.data_model.simulation.SimulationRun

batch_run_single_task.signature: (config: Union[tau2.data_model.simulation.TextRunConfig, tau2.data_model.simulation.VoiceRunConfig], task: tau2.data_model.tasks.Task, *, seed: Optional[int] = None, evaluation_type: tau2.evaluator.evaluator.EvaluationType = <EvaluationType.ALL: 'all'>, save_dir: Optional[pathlib.Path] = None, user_voice_settings: Optional[tau2.data_model.voice.VoiceSettings] = None, user_persona_config: Optional[tau2.data_model.persona.PersonaConfig] = None, verbose_logs: bool = False, audio_debug: bool = False, audio_taps: bool = False, auto_review: bool = False, review_mode: str = 'full', hallucination_feedback: Optional[str] = None) -> tau2.data_model.simulation.SimulationRun

batch_run_tasks.events: run/batch start/end and result persistence intent
batch_run_tasks.signature: (config: Union[tau2.data_model.simulation.TextRunConfig, tau2.data_model.simulation.VoiceRunConfig], tasks: list[tau2.data_model.tasks.Task], *, save_path: Optional[pathlib.Path] = None, save_dir: Optional[pathlib.Path] = None, evaluation_type: tau2.evaluator.evaluator.EvaluationType = <EvaluationType.ALL: 'all'>, console_display: bool = True, results_format: str = 'json') -> tau2.data_model.simulation.Results

environment_get_response.events: tool dispatch start/end and state hash before/after tool

evaluator_evaluate_simulation.signature: (simulation: tau2.data_model.simulation.SimulationRun, task: tau2.data_model.tasks.Task, evaluation_type: tau2.evaluator.evaluator.EvaluationType, solo_mode: bool, domain: str, mode: tau2.orchestrator.modes.CommunicationMode = <CommunicationMode.HALF_DUPLEX: 'half_duplex'>, env_kwargs: dict = None) -> tau2.data_model.simulation.RewardInfo

layer1_run_simulation.signature: (orchestrator: Union[tau2.orchestrator.orchestrator.Orchestrator, tau2.orchestrator.full_duplex_orchestrator.FullDuplexOrchestrator], *, evaluation_type: tau2.evaluator.evaluator.EvaluationType = <EvaluationType.ALL: 'all'>, env_kwargs: Optional[dict] = None) -> tau2.data_model.simulation.SimulationRun

orchestrator_step.events: turn start/end, message observed, agent/user responses, tool-call requests

simulation_evaluate_alias.events: simulation module alias for evaluation start/end
simulation_evaluate_alias.signature: (simulation: tau2.data_model.simulation.SimulationRun, task: tau2.data_model.tasks.Task, evaluation_type: tau2.evaluator.evaluator.EvaluationType, solo_mode: bool, domain: str, mode: tau2.orchestrator.modes.CommunicationMode = <CommunicationMode.HALF_DUPLEX: 'half_duplex'>, env_kwargs: dict = None) -> tau2.data_model.simulation.RewardInfo

user_simulator_generate_contract.events: user response start/end when concrete class method is present
